moments.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The climax of the 2026 FIFA World Cup is set for July 19th, with the final taking place at MetLife Stadium in New York/New Jersey, concluding a month of global football action.

angles.name: Countdown to the Final
angles.copy: Just one week to go until the biggest game in football! Who are you backing to lift the FIFA World Cup trophy next Sunday?

angles.name: World Cup Final Buzz
angles.copy: The FIFA World Cup 2026 final is just around the corner on July 19th! Who's made it to your dream final pairing?

moments.title: Love Island 2026 Final
moments.blurb: The 2026 series of Love Island is expected to conclude with its grand finale on Monday, July 27th, crowning the winning couple after eight weeks of villa drama.

angles.name: Love Island Countdown
angles.copy: The Love Island 2026 final is rumoured for July 27th! Who do you think will be coupling up for the win and the £50k prize?

angles.name: Final Weeks in the Villa
angles.copy: With only a couple of weeks left, the Love Island villa is heating up! Who's been your favourite islander this series?

moments.title: Kaleidoscope Festival
moments.blurb: Alexandra Palace Park in London hosts the Kaleidoscope Festival today, July 12th, featuring a diverse lineup of music, comedy, and arts.

angles.name: Live at Ally Pally
angles.copy: It's festival day in London! Kaleidoscope Festival takes over Alexandra Palace Park today with a fantastic lineup. Who's heading there?

angles.name: London Festival Vibes
angles.copy: The sun is shining for Kaleidoscope Festival at Ally Pally! Enjoying the music and good vibes today, London?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival, a celebration of Celtic music and culture, runs from July 15th to 18th in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland.

angles.name: Hebridean Celt Fest kicks off
angles.copy: Get ready for some incredible music! The Hebridean Celtic Festival begins on Wednesday in Stornoway. Who's heading to the Outer Hebrides?

angles.name: Scottish Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Stornoway is about to come alive with the Hebridean Celtic Festival from July 15-18. Expect amazing tunes and a fantastic atmosphere!

moments.title: Big Love Festival Wales
moments.blurb: The Big Love Festival, a music and arts festival, takes place in Monmouthshire, Wales, from July 16th to 19th, offering diverse acts and family activities.

angles.name: Big Love in Monmouthshire
angles.copy: Wales is getting ready for Big Love Festival! From Thursday, July 16th, enjoy music, arts, and good times in Monmouthshire. Are you going?

angles.name: Welsh Festival Fun
angles.copy: Big Love Festival kicks off this week in the beautiful Welsh countryside! Four days of diverse music and arts await from July 16-19.

moments.title: Splendour Festival Nottingham
moments.blurb: Nottingham's Splendour Festival, featuring multiple stages of music across genres, is held at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park on July 18th-19th.

angles.name: Splendour in Nottingham
angles.copy: Nottingham, get ready! Splendour Festival is back this weekend, July 18-19, for two days of amazing music at Wollaton Hall. Who's joining the party?

angles.name: Nottingham Festival Fun
angles.copy: Counting down to Splendour Festival this Saturday and Sunday! Which acts are you most excited to see in Nottingham?

moments.title: School's Out For Summer!
moments.blurb: Most schools across England begin their summer holidays around July 20th-22nd, marking the start of a six-week break for students.

angles.name: Summer Hols Begin
angles.copy: Nearly there! Schools in England are breaking up for summer holidays this week. Six weeks of fun are about to begin!

angles.name: Hello Summer Break
angles.copy: The countdown is on for the school summer holidays! Wishing all students a fantastic break starting from July 20-22!

moments.title: Happy 79th Brian May
moments.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday on July 19th, known for his iconic sound and songwriting.

angles.name: Brian May's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! The Queen legend continues to rock. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Brian May's 79th birthday on July 19th! His guitar work with Queen is simply iconic.

moments.title: Happy 79th Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Mexican-American rock legend Carlos Santana, known for his distinctive guitar style, turns 79 on July 20th.

angles.name: Santana's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the incredible Carlos Santana on July 20th! What's your go-to Santana track?

angles.name: Latin Rock Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the guitar maestro Carlos Santana, who turns 79 this Monday! His music transcends generations.

moments.title: Happy 78th Cat Stevens / Yusuf Islam
moments.blurb: British singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday on July 21st, acclaimed for his folk and rock hits.

angles.name: Cat Stevens Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the wonderful Cat Stevens, aka Yusuf Islam, on July 21st! His timeless songs bring joy to so many.

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring artistry of Cat Stevens for his 78th birthday this Tuesday. Which of his classic tracks is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy 79th Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of The Eagles, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 21st.

angles.name: Don Henley's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to The Eagles' legendary Don Henley on July 21st! What's your favourite Eagles song with Don on vocals?

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to Don Henley this Tuesday! A true rock icon.

moments.title: Happy 85th George Clinton
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 85th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk Master's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the incredible George Clinton on July 22nd! Get down with the funk legend's greatest hits today.

angles.name: P-Funk Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the Godfather of Funk, George Clinton, turning 85 this Wednesday! His influence on music is undeniable.

moments.title: Happy 34th Selena Gomez
moments.blurb: Singer, actress, and producer Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Selena's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the multi-talented Selena Gomez on July 22nd! What's your favourite song from her?

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating Selena Gomez's 34th birthday this Wednesday! From Disney to global pop star, she's done it all.

moments.title: Happy 84th Roger McGuinn
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder of the influential folk-rock band The Byrds, celebrates his 84th birthday on July 13th.

angles.name: Byrds Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 84th Birthday to Roger McGuinn of The Byrds on July 13th! His iconic Rickenbacker sound shaped a generation.

angles.name: Folk-Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating Roger McGuinn's 84th birthday this Monday! What's your favourite Byrds track?

moments.title: Happy 80th Linda Ronstadt
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Linda Ronstadt, a versatile artist across rock, country, and pop, celebrates her 80th birthday on July 15th.

angles.name: Linda Ronstadt's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 80th Birthday to the legendary Linda Ronstadt on July 15th! Her incredible voice spans so many genres.

angles.name: Music Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 80th to Linda Ronstadt this Wednesday! A true powerhouse vocalist.

moments.title: Happy 74th Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the dynamic drummer and co-founder of The Police, celebrates his 74th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Police Drummer's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th Birthday to the brilliant Stewart Copeland of The Police on July 16th! That distinctive drum sound is legendary.

angles.name: New Wave Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 74th to Stewart Copeland this Thursday! What's your favourite Police track?
